purpose: FTMO 2-Step challenge executor. FOCUSED BOOK: XAU champion + BTC + NDX, equal 1/3 (long-only champion recipe, portfolio vol-target). Same generic executor as the FundingPips basket (scripts/v5_basket_challenge_exec.py --config this).
_model_note: FTMO 2-Step (ftmo.com/en/trading-objectives, verified 2026-07-18): P1 +10% / P2 +5% target; 5% max daily loss (equity incl. floating, resets 00:00 CE(S)T); 10% max overall loss STATIC on initial; min 4 trading days; NO time limit; no 2-Step consistency rule; 1:100 leverage. Focused book @ 7% vol sim: eval SR 1.71, ~98.8% pass, 0% daily breaches, fail-DD 1.2%, median 13.3mo. Never raise vol mid-challenge.
_buffer_note: no-trade band: skip a symbol whose target vs held leverage differs by < buffer x its own target (cuts churn).

symbols._note: engine symbol -> FTMO broker name (verified live on FTMO-Demo 2026-07-18). contract_size/price read live at execute time.

BTC._broker: FTMO FULL, contract 1.0 BTC/lot, vmin 0.01, spread ~$1 (1.5bp)

guards._note: FTMO: daily limit 5% -> flatten at 3.5% from 00:00-CET anchor; max loss 10% -> halt at 8% from initial; targets +10% (P1) / +5% (P2). 1.5% buffer before each firm line.
